input.userMessage: ขอให้เจ้าหน้าที่ติดต่อกลับด้วยครับ
input.LastAImessage:

input.narrative: The advisor presented two TDR plan options. The customer has responded by stating they are willing to pay more per installment to clear the debt faster. The conversation is being routed back to the advisor to adjust the recommendation.

expectedOutput.narrative: The advisor presented several TDR plan options to the customer. The customer has now requested for a human agent to contact them back. The conversation is being routed to summary to handle the request.
